title: EGG: An Expert-Guided Agent Framework for Kernel Generation
abstract: arXiv:2606.26758v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: High-performance GPU kernels are critical for reducing the exponentially growing computational costs of large language models (LLMs), but their development heavily relies on manual tuning by domain experts. While recent advances in LLM-based approaches show promise for automating kernel generation, they still struggle to achieve both correctness and high performance. This limitation primarily arises from the lack of domain-specific optimization guidance, hindering effective exploration of the optimization space. We propose EGG, an Expert-Guided Agent Framework for Kernel Generation, which incorporates expert optimization principles to guide LLMs' decisions. Inspired by expert workflows, we decompose kernel generation into two hierarchical stages: 1) algorithmic structure design, which establishes a high-quality computational structure foundation; 2) hardware-specific tuning, which performs targeted adjustments through parallel mapping, t

translated_title: EGG：一种专家引导的核生成智能体框架
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26758v1 公告类型：新文 摘要：高性能GPU核对于降低大语言模型（LLM）指数级增长的计算成本至关重要，但其开发严重依赖领域专家的人工调优。尽管近期基于LLM的方法在自动化核生成方面展现出前景，但仍难以同时实现正确性与高性能。这一局限主要源于缺乏领域特定的优化指导，阻碍了对优化空间的有效探索。我们提出EGG——一种专家引导的核生成智能体框架，该框架融入专家优化原则以引导LLM的决策。受专家工作流程启发，我们将核生成分解为两个层次化阶段：1）算法结构设计，建立高质量的计算结构基础；2）硬件特定调优，通过并行映射、分块等技术进行针对性调整。
tldr: 提出EGG框架，通过将专家优化原则融入LLM决策，将核生成分解为算法结构设计与硬件特定调优两个层次阶段，以解决自动化核生成中正确性与高性能难以兼得的问题。
en_tdlr: EGG proposes an expert-guided agent framework that integrates expert optimization principles into LLM decisions, decomposing kernel generation into two hierarchical stages—algorithmic structure design and hardware-specific tuning—to address the challenge of achieving both correctness and high performance in automated kernel generation.
